bird.name: Ultramarine grosbeak
bird.summary: The ultramarine grosbeak (Cyanoloxia brissonii) is a species of grosbeak in the family Cardinalidae. It is found in a wide range of semi-op…

locations.name: 南美洲
locations.summary: 南亚美利加洲（英语：South America），简称南美洲，为七大洲之一，位於西半球南部（或南半球），西臨南太平洋，西面為太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊。太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊之間的內營力為張力，衍生了東太平洋海嶺；而納斯卡板塊與南美洲板塊的內…

locations.name: Cauca Valley montane forests
locations.summary: The Cauca Valley montane forests (NT0109) is an ecoregion in western Colombia.

relations.subject: Ultramarine grosbeak
relations.evidence: It is found in a wide range of semi-open habitats in eastern and central South America, with a disjunct population in northern South America

relations.subject: Ultramarine grosbeak
relations.evidence: An isolated population can be found in southwestern Colombia, between the Western and Central cordilleras throughout the Cauca valley and Dagua regions, where they prefer dry forest borders and semi-arid desert
